meta.label: React
meta.subject: react
meta.description: Restructured React learning dataset. Combined headings were split into individual topics. Practical prompts mixed into interview data were consolidated, completed with implementation fields, and placed under the correct React topic.

examples: JSX, Babel, bundling, Vite, and ES Modules are separate topics.
Virtual DOM, reconciliation, diffing, Fiber, and rendering phases are separate topics.
Components, props, state, immutability, batching, pure components, and React.memo are separate topics.
Every major hook is placed in its own topic, with lifecycle and cleanup separated from useEffect fundamentals.
Forms, controlled inputs, uncontrolled inputs, refs, forwardRef, and useImperativeHandle are separate topics.
Routing fundamentals, navigation, params, nested routes, Outlet, and protected routes are separate topics.
Redux fundamentals, store/actions/reducers, Toolkit, React Redux hooks, middleware, async Redux, and persistence are separate topics.
CSR, SSR, SSG, ISR, hydration, and SEO are separated.
Authentication, authorization, JWT, browser storage, Fetch, Axios, and HTTP concepts are separated.
Todo, counter, list/search/pagination, form, and mini-project exercises are organized under dedicated topics.
